findings.title: Multiple timer instances from rapid visibility toggles
findings.detail: Timer could be started multiple times causing multiple intervals to run simultaneously. Edge case: Rapid visibility toggles could create overlapping timers. Blind hunter noted: No handling for rapid visibility toggles - timer could be started multiple times.

findings.title: Missing error handling for onComplete callback
findings.detail: If onComplete throws, the timer could break without completing. Edge case: onComplete callback throws error could crash timer. Blind hunter noted: Missing error handling for onComplete callback - if onComplete throws, the timer could break.

findings.title: Invalid nextRoundNumber validation
findings.detail: No validation for negative or zero nextRoundNumber parameter. Edge case: Negative or zero nextRoundNumber could display invalid round. Blind hunter noted: No validation of nextRoundNumber parameter - could be negative or zero.

findings.title: Progress calculation precision issues
findings.detail: Progress bar calculation could result in floating point precision errors. Edge case: Progress calculation precision errors could show invalid values. Blind hunter noted: Progress bar calculation could result in floating point precision issues.

findings.title: Memory leaks from component unmounting
findings.detail: Component unmounting during active timer could cause memory leaks. Edge case: Component unmounts during timer leaves uncanceled timers. Blind hunter noted: No consideration for component unmounting during active timer.

findings.title: Match becomes inactive during timer
findings.detail: If match becomes inactive during timer, timer completes but round doesn't start.

findings.title: Race condition with useEffect dependencies
findings.detail: startTimer dependency could cause infinite re-render loops. Edge case: startTimer dependency changes could cause infinite re-renders. Blind hunter noted: Potential race condition with useEffect dependencies - startTimer dependency could cause infinite re-renders.

findings.title: Unnecessary recalculations during renders
findings.detail: Component recalculates barWidth on every render while timer is active.

findings.title: Multiple reveal completions create timers
findings.detail: Multiple reveal completions could create multiple timer instances.

findings.title: Missing null checks for props
findings.detail: Component could crash if props are undefined. Edge case: Props undefined or null could crash component. Blind hunter noted: Missing null checks for props - component could crash if props are undefined.

findings.title: Missing song fetch implementation
findings.detail: Violates AC 'fetch the next song from the catalog' - The timer completion handler calls startNewRound() but doesn't explicitly fetch the next song snippet.

findings.title: Incomplete state transition
findings.detail: Violates AC 'transition the local state to playing_snippet' - No explicit state transition to playing_snippet mode found in the implementation.

findings.title: Host-only timer display
findings.detail: Deviates from spec intent 'brief transition before the next song' - Non-host players see the timer but it doesn't function for them, creating inconsistent user experience.

findings.title: Missing file structure compliance
findings.detail: Violates spec requirement 'Update loop state' in pages/game.jsx - Implementation updates components/GameScreen.jsx instead of pages/game.jsx.

findings.title: Timer not automatically started for all players
findings.detail: Violates AC 'Start a 3-second countdown automatically after the reveal phase' - Only host starts timer, non-hosts don't get automatic countdown.

findings.title: No integration with song catalog
findings.detail: Violates technical requirement 'fetch the next song from the catalog' - No code found that interacts with song service or catalog during timer completion.

findings.title: Hardcoded 3-second duration reduces flexibility
findings.detail: Should be configurable via props for different game modes or preferences.

findings.title: Inconsistent accessibility labels
findings.detail: Progress bar and countdown have different label formats.

findings.title: Missing error boundaries
findings.detail: Component failures could crash the entire game.

findings.title: Overly complex timer logic
findings.detail: Could be simplified with setTimeout instead of setInterval.

findings.title: Missing keyboard navigation support
findings.detail: No keyboard navigation support for accessibility.

findings.title: No visual feedback for timer completion
findings.detail: No visual feedback for timer completion state.
